No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters understanding of Latin, Roman culture, and European civilization, promoting cultural diversity and its contribution to sustainable development (Target 4.7).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to industry, innovation, or infrastructure development.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: While studying history/philosophy could indirectly relate, the syllabus does not explicitly or implicitly focus on peace, justice, or institutional development.
